_comment: Source of truth for the build pipeline. Each entry maps a region id (slug) to its Geofabrik area path, bbox [W,S,E,N], display name, type, and ISO code (when applicable). build.sh resolves a region id from this file; the GitHub Actions workflow iterates the full list.
_notes: Bboxes are approximate (±0.5°). They drive the picker UX (Custom-tab size estimate, RegionResolver coverage) but never crop data — Planetiler/BRouter use the Geofabrik PBF as-is.
USA + Canada are state/province-split because the country-wide PBFs exceed GitHub Releases' 2 GB asset cap.
Russia uses Geofabrik's federal-district splits for the same reason.

China, India, Brazil are listed as single-country packs with skipBuild=true: their PBFs (~5-10 GB each) need bbox-based osmium splitting before they fit. Add the splits when you need them — see the comment on each entry.

regions.name: Brazil
regions.skipReason: PBF too big (~5 GB) — TODO: split by region (north/northeast/centerwest/southeast/south)

regions.name: China
regions.skipReason: PBF too big (~7 GB) — TODO: bbox-split by province via osmium

regions.name: India
regions.skipReason: PBF too big (~5 GB) — TODO: bbox-split by zone (north/south/east/west/central/northeast)
